fallbacks: GBrain not enabled; keep decisions in OpenSpec

decisions: Keep nodes and workflows as the system foundation
Reuse the existing Studio as the workspace and project index
Render the workspace index and active project editor as separate screens
Do not retain sibling project navigation inside the active project editor
Use Dify's project lifecycle after a project is opened
Treat acquisition, cleaning, knowledge, workflow, and delivery as separate projects when they have independent lifecycles
Use Linear for project work-item interaction
Use Paperclip for operational visualization, evidence, approvals, and attention
Separate debug from production and draft from published versions
blockers: Fresh 390 px automation is blocked because the selected browser has no viewport emulation and rejected the isolated harness
nextActions: Review the corrected workspace-index-to-project-editor C direction
Map only approved additions onto the existing Studio and WorkflowEditorSession
Re-run 390 px metrics when the environment supports them
